title: M. Valerius Chorton honoured as euergetes

handNote.lettering: The manuscript tradition records rhomboid closed omega; Torremuzza after Tardia also records lunate sigma.

date._: later first century BCE, or very beginning of the first century CE(?)

provenanceFound._: Recorded by Tardia in 1765, and transmitted to Torremuzza
